summary: Reviewed CORE-195 spec and plan against Core FR #188 and Work Items #195-#198.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm conformance`; `pnpm typecheck`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item CORE-195 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item CORE-195 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item CORE-195 --json` passed locally; PR #211 metadata readback/preflight passed; hosted basic checks run 28783910472 passed except merge gate pending current-head review.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Spec scope matches the FR batch: real-site read-only Core run records and result/query fixtures only, with explicit exclusion of live account operation and private browser/page material.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The planned implementation is bounded to Core runtime/schema/conformance artifacts and does not expand into #189/#190, App UI, Harbor/Lode code, or write-side behavior.
